title: setaria basiseta
intro: Setaria basiseta, also known as black millet or blackbeard grass, is a type of annual grass native to tropical and subtropical regions. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Setaria basiseta include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Setaria basiseta include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water.
